purpose: Transparent food-resource presentation icon with faithful runtime derivatives for the separately reviewed Alpha 0.3.7 shared-world resource authority; the artwork alone is not evidence of a balance, currency, reward, or entitlement.

projectAuthorization.scope: Add the background-cleaned food icon to Warpkeep PR #45 and permit its future official Warpkeep Pages runtime use if the separately reviewed mechanics are implemented.
notGranted: general third-party derivative or redistribution permission
currency, reward, value, or entitlement rights

sourceInputs.runtimeUse: visual composition and food-icon style reference only

generation.prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: in-game food resource icon for Warpkeep
Input image: edit target — the supplied rustic bread loaf, bundled wheat, and loose grain kernels.
Primary request: Preserve the illustrated food subject, composition, proportions, colors, flour texture, wheat detail, and visual style exactly. Replace only the checkerboard background with a perfectly flat solid #00ffff cyan chroma-key background for subsequent removal.
Composition/framing: keep the whole bread, wheat bundle, and grain kernels centered, fully visible, with generous even padding around them.
Lighting/mood: preserve the source's warm stylized golden food rendering on the subject only.
Constraints: change only the background; keep the food subject cleanly separated from it with crisp antialiased edges. Background must be exactly uniform #00ffff, with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, watermark, or text. Do not use #00ffff anywhere in the food artwork.

postDespill.selector: Visible pixels with saturation at or above 0.08 and hue from 70 through 190 degrees
postDespill.treatment: Preserve lightness and saturation while setting hue to the warm food palette's 38 degrees

referenceAsset.delivery: checked-in provenance master outside public/; only the exact reviewed 64 px faithful derivatives below are served by Pages

runtimeDerivative.authorizationBasis: The separately reviewed Alpha 0.3.7 resource authority activates the previously recorded owner authorization for official Warpkeep Pages runtime use.

installation.family: all eight Hegemony resource runtime outputs

licence.policy: The exact project instruction authorizes the recorded Warpkeep use but does not establish a public relicensing grant. See ASSETS-LICENSE.md.
